title: Cold Acquisition
description: Calling alumni who have never donated before. Build rapport from scratch and lead toward a soft first ask.
focusSkills: quality and successful completion of 3 asks

title: Lapsed Donors
description: Calling alumni who used to give but have stopped. Re-engage with empathy and understand why they paused.
focusSkills: quality and successful completion of 3 asks

title: Donors
description: Calling current annual donors to acknowledge their support and explore an upgrade.
focusSkills: quality and successful completion of 3 asks

title: Leadership Donors
description: Engaging high-capacity leadership donors. Requires preparation, executive presence, and named-gift framing.
focusSkills: quality and successful completion of 3 asks

title: Difficult Calls
description: Practice de-escalating hostile, distressed, or skeptical prospects. The win condition is often a graceful exit, not a gift.
focusSkills: quality and successful completion of 3 asks
